Late Night

     

Shown in the dark the emerging McDonald's arch lights the room with a Purple glow. A hue referenced from the night sky of the city. Framed inside the octagon on the wall is a form made to mimic long hair falling down someone’s back. It is created from jumbo bead hair ties found in a Beauty shop.
